Name: Sercomm
Description:
Sercomm has been committed to the development of broadband networking software and firmware and offers comprehensive telecom broadband solutions and is now a global leader in the industry. Headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan, Sercomm now employs thousands of people around the world. A global logistics network is now taking shape with R&D centers and production sites worldwide. Sercomm’s global operation networks are also covered in North American, European, and Asian Pacific markets, to provide great customer service. 

With R&D capabilities accumulated over many years, Sercomm has successfully mastered the key technologies and market trends of the telecom broadband industry, subsequently creating products for various user groups (i.e., home, commercial, telecom, security surveillance, and cloud-based applications) that offer clients broadband products with integrated designs and solutions. Sercomm serves frontline telecom operators in Europe, America, and emerging markets, and has successfully positioned itself as a global leading provider of broadband and telecom solutions.

Name: Allied Telesis
Description:
Our world is increasing in complexity. Organizations are changing at an ever-increasing rate. Businesses face an uphill battle to adapt to change and to stay ahead of the competition. At the same time, our cities are increasingly becoming more populated; and with this growth, issues such as demand on resources and public safety become a key focus for government and civic leaders. Today, more than any other time, you need a technology partner that has both the vision and the capability to take your network communications to where you need them to be.

Allied Telesis has been supplying network communications solutions for over 35 years. Today we are engaged in some of the most advanced and innovative next-generation network research, focusing efforts on development and production of more intelligent, autonomously controlled and managed systems that will be required to meet the demands of a world of Internet Things and smarter everything.

The capabilities and performance of next-generation networks will be defined by the software that configures, secures, manages and automates the infrastructure.
Our R&D investments are putting us on the main stage in the exploding era of IoT. As cloud computing uses servers, applications and other resources linked via a network, the infrastructure of that network and the ability to autonomously discover, manage, troubleshoot and resolve network issues will become fundamental to network operations.

We also take advantage of our position as a network specialist to provide software solutions needed for network administration. These range from administration and monitoring of network equipment to authentication of connected devices and network status analysis. Our world-class global professional services organization offers unsurpassed support together with network design recommendations, project consultation, staging services and post-installation support.

Name: LANCOM Systems GmbH
Description:
LANCOM Systems GmbH is a leading European manufacturer of networking and security solutions for the public and private sectors. Its portfolio comprises hardware (WAN, LAN, WLAN, firewalls), virtual network components and Cloud-based software-defined networking (SDN).
Software development, hardware development and production take place primarily in Germany, as does the hosting of the network management. Special attention is given to trustworthiness and security. The company is committed to offering products free from backdoors, and carries the trust seal “IT Security made in Germany” initiated by the German Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs.
LANCOM was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Würselen near Aachen, Germany. Its customers include SMEs, government agencies, institutions and enterprises from all over the world. Since summer 2018, LANCOM has been an independent subsidiary of the Munich technology group Rohde & Schwarz.

Name: Buyerdock - Digital Product Passport
Description:
Buyerdock is an automated digital platform, with over 900 brands and 50 million+ products using their automated QR code branded app, currently scanned in 105 countries.  Brands/Companies of all sizes, from startup to corporate can easily input their product data and unlock a multitude of benefits:

•    Digital Product Passport (DPP): The platform offers a pioneering DPP solution, ready for the EU legislation that became law in July 2024. Every single fashion, textile or shoe product sold in the EU will need a DPP during 2027. The solution automatically delivers all required elements such as supply chain mapping, traceability, repair, refurbish and many more, all seamlessly integrated behind a QR code.  Already used by many global brands/retailers.

•    Consumer App: Brands can reach consumers with a totally immersive branded experience through a dedicated per barcode/serial app. This app showcases brand and sustainability stories, social media, multilingual (84+ languages), how to guides, marketing opportunities, and more, all accessible via a QR code scan.  No coding skills needed, all automated along with per SKU analytics.

•    EU Recycle Regulations: The patented automated tool delivers complex EU recycle logos. It generates the correct logo on a per SKU basis, currently law in France, Italy, Spain & Portugal - no logo, no sale along with huge fines. The tool also delivers the required AGEC text per product in French.

•    Future-Proof QR codes powered by GS1: All QR codes are future-proofed using GS1 digital link technology, they will both beep in warehouse, at checkout and scan by consumers at home. They are fully compliant to the GS1 Sunrise 2027 program.

Name: Brocade Russia
Description:
Компания Brocade (NASDAQ: BRCD) специализируется на разработке инновационных сетевых решений, которые оптимизируют развертывание, администрирование и масштабирование высокопроизводительных сетей даже в самых сложных ИТ-средах. Использование ведущих отраслевых технологий и непревзойденный опыт позволяют компании Brocade создавать решения, которые повышают отказоустойчивость сети и, следовательно, адаптивность и эффективность бизнеса, подготавливая его к требованиям завтрашнего дня.

Компания Brocade предоставляет широкий спектр инновационных решений (от передовых фабрик до программируемых сетей) для сетей ЦОД, сервис-провайдеров и кампусных сетей. Решения компании помогают упростить сетевую инфраструктуру, сократить расходы на нее, а также подготовить сеть к внедрению виртуализации и облачных технологий. 

Головной офис компании расположен в г. Сан-Хосе, штат Калифорния, а число сотрудников во всех офисах мира составляет  примерно 5 000 человек. Заказчиками Brocade являются организации из различных отраслей в более чем 160 странах. На сегодняшний день компания Brocade является ведущим производителем самых функциональных и надежных решений для сетей хранения данных (SAN). Кроме того, компания является разработчиком технологии Ethernet-фабрик и высокопроизводительных решений для сетей Ethernet. Эти решения входят в комплексный портфель продуктов для коммутации, маршрутизации, беспроводной связи.

Для удовлетворения растущих требований распределенных и мобильных ИТ-сред компания Brocade распространяет свой проверенный опыт разработки продуктов для ЦОД на все компоненты сети. Такой подход позволяет организациям реализовывать инициативы по консолидации ресурсов, обеспечению мобильного доступа, внедрению виртуализации и облачных вычислений.

Name: Rede Compre Certo
Description:
Rede Compre Certo: Fortalecendo o varejo farmacêutico independente desde 2010.

Nascemos em 18 de novembro de 2010 com uma missão clara: unir e fortalecer farmácias e drogarias independentes, capacitando-as para prosperar diante dos novos desafios do mercado.

Entendemos que a união gera força. Por isso, nosso modelo de gestão foi construído sobre pilares sólidos:

Análise de Mercado aprofundada: Identificamos as melhores oportunidades e estratégias para nossos parceiros.

Poder de Negociação: Consolidamos parcerias estratégicas com as principais indústrias e distribuidoras, garantindo condições comerciais superiores.

Soluções para Competitividade: Oferecemos um portfólio de serviços e produtos desenhado para aumentar a lucratividade e a eficiência operacional de cada loja.

Atualmente, impulsionamos o sucesso de nossos associados em Minas Gerais e São Paulo através de dois modelos de negócio flexíveis:

CREDENCIAMENTO: Para o empresário que busca mais competitividade e vantagens comerciais, mantendo a independência de sua marca.

FRANQUIA: Para quem deseja uma solução completa, com padronização, suporte robusto e a força de uma marca consolidada.

Junte-se à Rede Compre Certo e transforme o futuro da sua farmácia.

Name: Titan IC
Description:
Titan IC is a world leader in the development of hardware accelerated intellectual property for cyber Security Analytics Acceleration (SAA) and content processing.

Titan IC works with national security agencies and cybersecurity appliance OEMs as well as cloud computing providers.  

Our technology is designed for high throughput low latency Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) applications that require packet payload inspection which can be achieved using regular expression (RegEx) pattern matching and string matching.  

We enable intrusion detection and security information and event management systems to search for thousands of cyber threat signatures in parallel and at network line speed for real-time alerting or to search through large datasets to reduce the search time for cybersecurity forensics.  

Our technology is available as a PCIe card, a vASSP, an IP for FPGA and IP for ARM(R) based System on Chip (SOC) solutions or as an FPGA in the cloud on AWS F1.  

The range of applications include: 

Security Analytics Acceleration (SAA)
Next Generation Firewall (NGFW)
Deep Packet Inspection (DPI)
Deep Flow Inspection (DFI)
Intrusion Prevention System (IPS)
Distributed Denial of Service Mitigation (DDoS)
SmartNIC
Network Monitoring
Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
Advanced auditing of user/application security policies
Rule based content processing for spam, URLs, adware
Financial data mining - parsing of streamed financial feeds

Name: Gambit Communications
Description:
Gambit Communications is a leader in network, SNMP and IoT simulation tools. MIMIC Simulator is a modular family of simulators used by leading networking vendors for use in network app development, testing to operator training and disaster simulations. Gambit's portfolio of many customers includes: IBM, JP Morgan, VISA, Shell, US Army, US Air Force, CA, HP, Cisco, Juniper, Intel, AT&T, Alcatel-Lucent, Dell and many more. For more information on Gambit and MIMIC, please visit www.gambitcomm.com .

MIMIC Simulator Suite:
MIMIC Simulator creates a real world lab environment, with 100,000 devices, at a fraction of the cost of physical equipment. It provides an interactive hands-on lab for quality assurance, development, sales presentation, evaluation, deployment and training of enterprise management applications. Users create a customizable virtual environment populated with simulated routers, hubs, switches, WiFi/WiMAX/LTE devices, probes, cable modems, servers and workstations.
MIMIC Simulator supports SNMP(v3), NetFlow, sFlow, IPFIX, Telnet/SSH, Redfish/IPMI, MQTT/IoT, SOAP/XML, DHTP, TFTP and many more protocols.

MIMIC SNMP Simulator:

MIMIC SNMP Agent Simulator creates a network of up to 100,000 SNMP-manageable devices. You can create any SNMP-based device with any number of public or private MIBs to run a large variety of device configurations with your SNMP management application. It lets you generate thousands of traps to simulate disaster scenarios.Simulated devices respond to SNMPv1, SNMPv2C and SNMPv3 queries. It appears to the SNMP Network Management Application as if it is talking to actual devices. Each device has its own IP (or IPv6) address. Devices can be configured at run-time, both on an individual and collective basis. 

MIMIC Discovery Wizard can record your production network with thousands of real-world devices to simulate them and multiply many times. MIMIC MIB Wizard can compile any number of MIBs, in any order at the same time.

Name: InterfereX Communications Inc
Description:
Consumers are rapidly making the switch to over-the-top (OTT) video services and live streaming applications like Facebook Live.  This has been enabled by highly capable mobile devices, uncapped high speed broadband to homes and uncapped high speed cellular data.

The technical challenges with OTT services includes minimizing buffering, maximizing data rate and minimizing startup time.  Data shows that when poor performance occurs that consumers disengage and often leave these services (also called churn).  Some OTT services have churn rates as high as 30% which is a huge cost to the business to find new customers through advertising and marketing.

Why InterfereX? 
InterfereX directly addresses the challenges of OTT Video delivery.  The CLRifex product under extensive US wide trials has shown that when congestion exists that it can enhance OTT VoD performance dramatically. Our results show that we can increase the data rates by more than twice, while enhancing the quality by more than 70%.

Our highly scalable platform provides unique and highly differentiated algorithms to enhance OTT Video delivery and is suitable for content owners, content delivery companies, and Content delivery networks. Our team has many years of practical experience on building highly complex deep technology systems at scale.

Name: ZeroLatency ltd
Description:
Zerolatency develops a new breed of technologies to provide  network visibility and universal latency monitoring. 

Today we rely more and more on information exchanged almost instantaneously but we don’t have an easy way to measure the data latency.
Zerolatency introduces TimePack, a new technology which blends information and time/location in the same data packet, improving network monitoring (more efficient, cost effective and interoperable) and creating a new ecosystem of latency aware network/applications (codecs, sensor networks, IoT).
The IT market is looking for visibility on the network without sacrificing simplification and interoperability, this method works on physical and cloud infrastructures in a transparent way and totally compliant with the existing standards.
It is a very efficient technology because it does not generate any extra traffic, it does not need event correlation, it can be applied on every device traversed by the information packet and it can be analysed by any existing product.

We consider this technology a game-changer and we cannot fully estimate the impact on all fields where it could be applied, for example we can see an interesting application on power grid outage monitoring   but we should really speak with microwave network providers to assess its feasibility.

Name: Women Who Keynote
Description:
Women Who Keynote is a platform designed for women* and non-binary individuals to promote themselves for speaking opportunities.

Our platform is designed to showcase speakers of all experience levels and across all industries. If you have something to say, you are a potential keynote speaker.

Mission
Denying women opportunities to present at professional conferences and events prevents them from gaining visibility and deprives their colleagues of their valuable perspectives. Failure to listen to the voices of female experts contributes to the continued gender diversity problems experienced in many industries.

The mission of Women Who Keynote is to contribute to the elimination of all-male panels and help improve the visibility of women in male-dominated industries. Our platform is intended to hold event organisers to account and encourage greater diversity in their speaker lineups. For us, this mission encompasses all underrepresented genders.

* Note

Women Who Keynote is designed for all underrepresented genders. Our use of the term ‘women’ encompasses all women, including transgender women and cis women. ‘Gender non-binary’ encompasses people who are genderqueer and gender non-conforming.

Being non-consensually positioned in the category of ‘women’ could be regarded as the implicit misgendering of a non-binary person or a trans man or those belonging to other minority genders. Women Who Keynote promotes speakers who are gender non-binary or trans men only in the case where the speaker has consented to this by joining our platform.

Fanout makes it easy to build realtime APIs and apps. We’re a cross between a reverse proxy and a message broker. Receivers subscribe to channels, and published data is delivered in realtime.

Name: PacketX Technology
Description:
“Software defines anything” is not only a trend but the way PacketX walks. The flexibility of software is definitely encouraging many innovative applications on IP network. Our focus is developing DPI-enabled systems for IP network in three fields: sophisticated network visibility, off-line packet stream analysis and packet2BigData.

Sophisticated Network Visibility
The network visibility infrastructure is critical for today’s network. It supports the intrusion detection, troubleshooting or any other application that needs to inspect the packets. PacketX’s product, GRISM, has the flexible DPI engine to classify the packets according to user-defined sophisticated signatures for delivering the packets to multiple applications in line rate.

Off-line Packet Stream Analysis
PacketX also provides the off-line analysis tool, TURING, which is the add-on software package for GRISM. It is able to record the real-time packet streams and also can inspect the off-line recorded data in wire speed by leveraging GRISM’s DPI engine. It gives you the semantic understanding for the network.

Packet2BigData
This is the solution designed for digging out user/subscriber behavior intelligence especially for telecom operators or sizable enterprises. We would like to provide a customized program: for a legacy IP network, to create the intelligence, from both user plane and control plane , extraction framework and inject those data into BigData database for further analysis.

NOVA enhances business service delivery and availability in three important ways:
 1. NOVA uniquely provides secure access, visibility and control from any location at any time to infrastructure resources of an enterprise located anywhere in the cloud or in a data center.  
2. NOVA manages change dynamically in applications infrastructures in data centers and clouds. NOVA provides real time change control of physical and virtual resources seamlessly across networks, servers and applications.
 3. Current large Customers of NOVA product line, have used NOVA to assure continuous operational and security compliance with best practices and benchmarks (based on required regulatory standards such as PCI), cohesively for resources in the cloud and in data centers. Name: InternX
Description:
InternX provides an efficient way for universities to hold both virtual & in-person fairs.

-------
HOW IT WORKS
Students make a profile on InternX.  Recruiters filter through students to find the exact, qualified candidates that they want to meet during career fairs (virtual or in-person).  Students get to pick a time during the fair to meet with the recruiter that reached out to them, increasing quality connections and efficiency.

We’re here for the university, employers, and students. We get students job offers from companies for which they want to work. We find recruiters the exact students they want for their positions. We provide companies and universities direct feedback that they can utilize to improve their processes.

CHANGING THE RULES OF THE GAME
The site has successfully shaken up traditional recruiting practices.  Instead of aimlessly wandering around career fairs and blindly applying on job boards, we have companies directly connect with students. Companies reach out when they think students are a good fit, and these students get to speak directly with the recruiters that reached out to them. This allows everyone to skip the small talk and get directly into the interview process.

Name: Synintra
Description:
* Synintra 2018 : comment ça marche ? 

Forte d’un partenariat conclu en septembre 2018 avec LCL, Synintra devient LA plateforme qui permet aux grands groupes, ETI, administrations territoriales et à toute entreprise mature de rentrer efficacement en contact avec les jeunes entreprises innovantes du moment. Synintra est désormais ouverte à toutes les startups de France qui pourront répondre à des appels à projets lancés en exclusivité sur Synintra par les “clients entreprise” de LCL.
Pour les startups, Synintra offre des opportunités uniques via les appels à projets et donne accès à des réseaux entrepreneuriaux et business à l’échelle du pays. Aux groupes, elle offre la possibilité d’innover, communiquer, développer, co-créer ou acheter auprès des startups françaises.

* Synintra : réseau digital de pépinières d'entreprises

Depuis son lancement en 2012, Synintra s’est développée en suivant un fil rouge : la réponse aux besoins des structures d’accompagnement (hôtels, incubateurs, pépinières d’entreprises), mais aussi et surtout aux besoins des entrepreneurs qu’elles hébergent, entraide, recrutement, opportunités de business. Synintra regroupe aujourd’hui 80% des pépinières françaises.
Ainsi, la plateforme simplifie l’organisation interne de ces structures, permet de créer le lien entre les entreprises hébergées et facilite les synergies entrepreneuriales dans et entre les centaines de pépinières et incubateurs d’entreprises présentent sur le réseau.
 
* Un support pour les pépinières d’entreprise

Synintra optimise l’organisation et leur communication avec les startups et les PME hébergées.
Elle mutualise plusieurs outils grâce à une interface simple permettant une utilisation pratique et accessible à tous. 
Grâce à son réseau national, elle crée le lien entre les différentes communautés d'entrepreneurs et répond au besoin des jeunes sociétés de bénéficier d'un réseau professionnel démultiplié et de qualité.

Name: Akheros
Description:
Akheros is a software development lab, producing resident cybersecurity learning algorithms, which learns machines’ informational behavior in order to anticipate, detect and prevent offensive and incongruous behaviors of machine to machine interactions. 

Laureate of the French  2013 national innovation awards (Oseo), Akheros is based on patented autonomous learning algorithms. Its detection capability and its knowledge (situational awareness) increase over time.  Akheros does not require an access to an external database of signatures, known threats, or “healthy behaviors”. Akheros assesses the incongruity of behaviors in relation to what the software learns from previous machine behavior.

Located in the heart of Paris' Latin Quarter, Akheros welcomes spontaneous job applications. Applicants must possess experience in cybersecurity development (IDS - IPS) and machine learning (Bayesian modeling).

Name: Colasoft
Description:
Since 2001, Colasoft has dedicated itself to the development of NPMD (network performance monitoring and diagnostics) software and hardware solutions. More than 10000 commercial customers from over 100 countries choose Colasoft NPMD solutions, including government agencies, financial services, education, manufacturing, transportation, utilities and energy. Featured customers include IBM, Dell, Philips, Emerson, and other industry leading companies. 

Colasoft is named as a Visionary in Gartner MQ for Network Performance Monitoring and Diagnostics in 2018. This is the first time Colasoft NPMD products has been evaluated by Gartner, and we could not be more proud to be positioned in the Visionaries quadrant.

Our NPMD solution includes the following products and features:

Capsa (https://www.colasoft.com/capsa/) 
a portable network performance analysis and diagnostics tool, performs real-time packet capturing capability, advanced protocol analysis, in-depth packet decoding, and automatic expert diagnosis.

nChronos (https://www.colasoft.com/nchronos/) 
Captures 100% of all data captured for real-time analysis as well as historical playback. It deliver the capability of 24x7 continuous packet capturing, unlimited data storage, efficient data mining and in depth traffic analysis.

Colasoft UPM (https://www.colasoft.com/upm/) 
Focus on business-oriented network performance management. It is capable of monitoring service quality of all respects of a business network and quickly detecting and pinpointing problems affecting performance and stability of key business.

Thank you for visiting our page! If you have any inquiry or feedback, please email us at service@colasoft.com.

Name: International Non Directive Coaching Society
Description:
MISIÓN: ¿PARA QUÉ EXISTIMOS?

La International Non Directive Coaching Society (Sociedad Internacional de Coaching No Directivo) existe para investigar, promover y divulgar la esencia más pura del coaching entendida como un proceso de ayuda no directivo, donde quien ayuda (el coach o profesional del coaching) no transfiere conocimiento ni experiencia, y se abstiene de emitir juicios sobre el contenido del proceso para así procurar el desarrollo del conocimiento tácito, creativo y particular de sus clientes.


VISIÓN: ¿CÓMO VEMOS CUMPLIDO NUESTRO PROPÓSITO?

Auto-gestionando en red el movimiento internacional del coaching no directivo a través de personas comprometidas con un marco metodológico coherente entre la historia, teoría y ética del coaching. Entendemos que investigando, dialogando, opinando y criticando libre y respetuosamente sobre cualquier aspecto relacionado con el mundo del coaching, y colaborando voluntariamente entre nosotros por esta causa común, creando, desarrollando e impulsando o promoviendo programas, productos o servicios alineados a la esencia de la no directividad en el coaching, es la mejor manera de contribuir para que dicha esencia permanezca y siga evolucionando en su sistematización y práctica.


VALORES: ¿QUÉ PRINCIPIOS FUNDAMENTALES RIGEN NUESTRO COMPORTAMIENTO?

- Libertad
- Responsabilidad
- Coherencia

Name: Humaris
Description: In juni 2017 heeft de paraDIGMA groep, de moedermaatschappij van Argo Advies, een nieuwe dochterorganisatie opgericht: Humaris. Het doel van Humaris is om zorg te dragen voor een discrete overdracht van persoonsgegevens van een werkgever naar de labels van de paraDIGMA groep, waaronder Argo Advies. Humaris helpt werkgevers met het organiseren van persoonsgegevens binnen haar organisatie en het doorgeven van deze gegevens tussen uw systemen en de systemen die de paraDIGMA groep gebruikt. Hiermee kunnen wij een goede privacybalans garanderen en bereiken wij wat de AP van ons vraagt. De medewerkers van Argo Advies hebben enkel nog toegang tot de gegevens die echt relevant zijn voor de begeleiding van uw werknemers. Omdat Humaris u helpt met het inrichten van uw HR-systeem voor uitwisseling van informatie met externe systemen, heeft Humaris een wettelijke grondslag om alle persoonsgegevens te mogen verwerken. Uiteraard is er een strikte scheiding tussen de toegang tot gegevens door Humaris en de overige labels van de paraDIGMA groep.

Name: DiMa.hu Kft
Description:
A DiMa.hu kft 2004 óta foglalkozik tárhelyszolgáltatással és domainregisztrációval, 2007 óta kft-ként.

Az elmúlt években a növekvő ügyfélszám mellett egyre több tapasztalatra tettünk szert, megismertük ügyfeleink igényeit - melyekre mindig igyekszünk kielégítő megoldást találni. Az évek során a két alapszolgáltatás mellé számos kapcsolódó terméket fejlesztettünk, de a tárhely és domain jelentősége nem csökkent. A szinte teljesen automatizált rendszerünkkel gyerekjáték a megrendelés és maximum 24 órán belül aktív a szolgáltatás. 
A különböző tárhelycsomagok és domainregisztrációs lehetőségek mellett SSL-tanúsítványt, SMTP- és hírlevél-szolgáltatást kínálunk. Csakúgy, mint rendszergazdai szolgáltatást, honlapkészítést vagy szerverbérlést. 
Magyarországon szinte egyedülálló módon nálunk ingyen tesztelhető a leendő tárhely. Célunk ezzel, hogy a megrendelő megismerje hoszting szolgáltatásunkat, és legyen ideje kialakulni a bizalmi kapcsolatnak. Az összes tárhelyszolgáltatásunk képes CMS rendszerek futtatására vagy saját php és adatbázis rendszerek működtetésére. A tesztidő alatt elkötelezettség nélkül van lehetőség a leendő tárhely kipróbálására.
Szolgáltatásaink, a különböző tárhelycsomagok részletes összehasonlítása itt: 
https://www.dima.hu/

Name: bservices
Description:
Notre engagement : "Mettre nos compétences au service de votre succés"

Une récente étude du BCG sur l'emergence du continent africain classe le Maroc dans le top 3 des pays africains au potentiel de croissance le plus prometteur , avec l'Egypte et l'Afrique du Sud.

Ce classement n'est pas le fruit du hasard.En effet, notre pays s'est engagé dans un processus de réformes ambitieux en vue d'exploiter plus d'opportunités et avec pour objectif  "l'insertion du pays par ses entreprises et ses universités dans l'economie mondiale du savoir".

A ce titre, il est urgent et crucial, d'ameliorer le niveau d'informatisation de nos entreprises.Et cela est tout à fait à notre portée compte tenu des prouesses technologiques disponibles. C'est une priorité et un effort national auquel bservices participe en mettant à contribution son expertise et son savoir faire.

Au sein de bservices, nous pensons que des technologies de l'information adaptées au contexte des entreprises marocaines sont LA solution pour rattraper le retard, redistribuer les cartes et positionner le Maroc parmi les pays émergents les plus dynamiques.

Ainsi l'innovation est inscrite dans les genes de bservices pour accompagner chacun de ses clients dans la mise en oeuvre de sa stratégie de développement.

Au plaisir d'être à vos côtés pour nous inscrire, ensemble, dans un succès durable.

Name: LIFTUS Air Solutions
Description:
LIFTUS Air Solutions is a startup-based company, aiming to bring business solutions for SMEs and freelancers alike. We have developed an autonomous UAV that with the addition of our image recognition software, allows us to remotely monitor any kind of terrain.

Our UAVs are fully electrically powered. They are suited with an array of solar panels over the wing surface of the aircraft, that gives the UAV a range of several tens of kilometers at a maximum flying height of 300meters. The communication between ground control and aircraft is carried through 2,4ghz radio and 4G LTE network, allowing for unlimited control range as far as LTE connection is available.

Terrain monitoring is achieved through live image analysis. Video feed is sent in real time by the UAV through the LTE network and processed in the receiver device by our proprietary python-based image recognition software.

The design has been developed with a modular physical and logical architecture. This promotes agile methodology in future updates of our products. Ranging from the inclusion of novel algorithms, development of sensor technology and reducing cost of infield repairs.

LIFTUS UAVs give SMEs and freelancers an environmentally friendly option for land control (e.g. detection of forest fires and drying of crops), avoiding the disturbance of wildlife and remaining carbon neutral. Autonomous remote surveyance open to everyone.

Name: The Embedded Internet Book
Description:
“THE EMBEDDED INTERNET: TCP/IP BASICS, IMPLEMENTATION, AND APPLICATIONS”, published by Addison-Wesley [Pearson Education – ISBN: 0321306384] on February 2007.

Book Description

Publication Date: 14 Feb 2007 | ISBN-10: 0321306384 | ISBN-13: 978-0321306388 | Edition: 1 
In The Embedded Internet Sergio Scaglia examines the techniques that programmers  will need to learn to obtain internet connectivity for their embedded systems. Sometimes this will be relatively straight-forward, using TCP/IP stack implementations which already exist. Sometimes, this will be much more difficult, requiring whole new implementations to be developed. Either way, The Embedded Internet will be the ideal starting place for programmers to learn and develop these skills.

The book is structured in three parts. The first part comprehensively covers TCP/IP. This gives the reader the necessary background knowledge of the internet that they will need when considering embedded systems connectivity. The second part details how to implement embedded internet systems. The third and final part gives a conceptual overview of just a handful of the countless ways in which internet connectivity can benefit an embedded system.

Name: Cisco Indonesia
Description:
Register for Cisco Connect 2026: bit.ly/ciscoconnect2026

Cisco enables people to make powerful connections--whether in business, education, philanthropy, or creativity. Cisco hardware, software, and service offerings are used to create the Internet solutions that make networks possible--providing easy access to information anywhere, at any time. 

Cisco was founded in 1984 by a small group of computer scientists from Stanford University. Since the company's inception, Cisco engineers have been leaders in the development of Internet Protocol (IP)-based networking technologies. Today, with more than 71,000 employees worldwide, this tradition of innovation continues with industry-leading products and solutions in the company's core development areas of routing and switching, as well as in advanced technologies such as home networking, IP telephony, optical networking, security, storage area networking, and wireless technology. In addition to its products, Cisco provides a broad range of service offerings, including technical support and advanced services. 

Cisco sells its products and services, both directly through its own sales force as well as through its channel partners, to large enterprises, commercial businesses, service providers, and consumers.

Name: Proactive Technologies
Description:
Abacus Group Has Acquired Proactive Technologies

NEW YORK, February 13, 2019 – Abacus Group, a global provider of IT services for alternative investment firms, today announced it has completed the acquisition of competitor Proactive Technologies. The two companies will merge under the Abacus Group umbrella, combining their leading-edge technologies, similar philosophies of premium customer service, operational synergies and talent pools.

Since its founding in 2007, Proactive has grown to service over 120 alternative investment clients, mostly in the New York City area. As a result of the acquisition, Abacus Group, which as of year-end 2018 services over 400 clients across the US and the UK, will now be the largest IT managed service provider specialized in alternative investment firms in the New York metropolitan region, based on client count. For year-end 2018, Abacus Group and Proactive Technologies reported 23% and 18% year-over-year revenue growth, respectively.

Founded in 2008, Abacus currently has over 125 employees across eight offices, in New York, NY; San Francisco, CA; Boston, MA; Dallas, TX; Greenwich, CT; Los Angeles, CA; Charlotte, NC; and London, England. Proactive has over 45 employees, the majority of which are New York-based and will move into Abacus’ newly renovated headquarters in midtown Manhattan.

Jacob Cane, president and co-founder of Proactive, and Dave Cava, COO and co-founder of Proactive, have joined Abacus’ leadership team as Managing Directors, and will assist with facilitating the integration of Proactive’s employees and clients into Abacus’ systems over the next nine to 12 months.

Proactive clients will eventually be able to take advantage of an extensive menu of leading-edge technologies and solutions available on the Abacus Cloud platform, including a hosted voice service, application hosting, 24x7 helpdesk, dedicated cybersecurity team, global presence and a suite of compliance tools within the proprietary Abacus Client Portal.

Name: Soha Systems, Inc. (acquired by Akamai Technologies)
Description:
Enterprises are providing access to their corporate applications in much the same way they did twenty years ago. But, in today’s cloud and mobile-centric world – in which IT organizations need to provide third parties access to behind the firewall applications – how can IT ensure secure access without the chronic pain and complexity that goes along with providing third party access?

The Soha Cloud Solution

Soha Systems is the innovator in enterprise secure access delivered as a service. We bring a radically new approach for third-party access to applications hosted in data centers and hybrid cloud environments. Our service, Soha Cloud, provides a unique alternative to traditional remote access technologies such as VPNs, RDP and proxies. With Soha Cloud, no one can get to applications directly because they are hidden from the Internet and public exposure. Our dual-cloud architecture closes all inbound firewall ports while providing authenticated end users access to only their specific applications. Soha Cloud integrates data path protection, identity access, application security and management visibility and control into a single service.

Soha Cloud is PCI compliant, offering e-commerce and physical retail customers the most secure infrastructure environment possible for processing and transmitting cardholder data.

Soha Cloud can be deployed in minutes, through a unified portal, with a single point of control, in any network environment, and at a fraction of the cost of traditional solutions. The result is a secure access delivery model that enables a zero CapEx, low OpEx model for critical workloads deployed in any environment.

For more information, visit http://www.soha.io and join the conversation on Twitter @sohasystems.

Cirries products are implemented in-line, or off-line, to simplify the acquisition and distribution of network data to the variety of tools used by network security, planning, engineering, operations and marketing teams.

Operating as an intermediary software component, each Cirries product processes traffic and distributes the information to the tools that deliver Security, Performance Management, Compliance and Analytics solutions.

FidoNet was originally founded as a non-commercial network in 1984 by Tom Jenning as a means to network BBSes that used his own "Fido" BBS software. Over time, other BBS software was independently adapted to support the relevant FidoNet protocols and the network became a popular means for computer users to communicate.

Name: Transnumeric
Description:
TRANSNUMERIC a pour vocation la conception, la mise en œuvre et l'exploitation de réseaux multimédias d'entreprises LAN, MAN et WAN.

L'entreprise fondée en 1989, a été précurseur dans le domaine de l’intégration Voix-Données, en développant dès 1990 des équipements de multiplexage voix et données avec l’aide de L’ANVAR et de la CEE (Programme Sprint).
Outre ses capacités propres de développement, Transnuméric bénéficie de la reconnaissance d’acteurs majeurs du secteur des réseaux et de la sécurité informatique dont : Cisco System, Opnet, Ipanema, Fortinet, Aerohive, Firetide, Lifesize.

Les intervenants de Transnuméric sont certifiés par plusieurs de ces fabricants.


Depuis 1989, Transnumeric  a exercé 3 métiers :

     Equipementier de 1989 à 1999
     Intégrateur depuis 1997
     Ingénierie et conseil depuis 2004

Cette longue expérience des réseaux d'entreprise a permis à Transnumeric d'acquérir une connaissance approfondie des problématiques, des technologies et des acteurs (Equipementiers, intégrateurs, opérateurs) de ce métier.

Transnuméric fournit et déploie des solutions complètes et adaptées pour les réseaux critiques, nationaux et internationaux, assure la maintenance et le support des équipements et logiciels mis en place.


En 2008 e-Qual acquière Transnuméric.

e-Qual, créée en juin 2000 à Poitiers par M. Philippe de Lussy, obtient sa licence d’opérateur L33.1 en Décembre 2001 et propose ainsi un service de couverture satellite sur l’Europe, l’Afrique, le Moyen-Orient et l’Asie Centrale.

Aujourd’hui fort de son expérience e-Qual contrôle et supervise plus de 500 noeuds de réseaux, ainsi qu’une centaine de serveurs dans plus de 45 pays.
Installé sur la Technopole du Futuroscope depuis 2000, e-Qual est un opérateur global de Services Managés, 24h sur 24 et 7 jours sur 7.

Name: Cable Labels Canada | The best Cable Labels in Canada
Description:
Cable Labels Canada provides the most cost effective cable labeling products to ensure successful completion of projects based on Sensible Engineering and budgetary requirements.  Over the years we have also used and tested hundreds of products, the best ones we sell and use in our company every day. We have the right products for your network cable labeling and we will better any price you can find for cable labels.

Our cable labels are designed to wrap round the cable, laminating themselves as they are applied to create a durable, easy-to-read cable label. These new and unique self-laminating laser labels designed to cope with the increasingly harsh environments that network cabling has to tolerate. Cable labels spend their lives on twisted cables, exposed to high temperatures or harsh cooling, depending on their specific location within a site, so traditional cable labels are frequently pushed to their limits of adhesion.

The new improved labels print well to give a high quality, crystal clear print that is easy to read and will run through Laser printers without jamming or wasted labels. They are thinner, more flexible and have upgraded adhesive for superb performance and greater adhesion in both normal and harsher environments.

Made from adhesive polyester, suitable for all standard Laser printers and MADE in the USA.

Name: De Wifi Specialist
Description:
De Wifi Specialist helpt u snel uit de brand. Onze monteurs zijn altijd snel ter plaatse en kunnen voor u:
met speciale meetapparatuur een netwerkscan doen en zo vaststellen waar het probleem ligt;
storingen door andere apparaten zoals magnetron of DECT-telefoon opsporen;
de acces points (routers e.d.) op de juiste plek te zetten, zodat u ook op meerdere verdiepingen goede ontvangst hebt;
de apparatuur beter instellen;
als nodig de hardware vervangen door slimmere apparatuur.
Wifi aanleggen
Bent u starter of net verhuist? Dan kan de Wifi Specialist u natuurlijk ook helpen door een goede, stabiele Wifi-verbinding aan te leggen.

Onderhoud Wifi-omgeving
In een bedrijf met meer dan drie werknemers kan de Wifi-verbinding al snel instabiel worden. Dat kan meerder oorzaken hebben, zoals overbelasting, verkeerde instellingen of een vastgelopen computer. De Wifi Specialist kan dit soort problemen voorkomen door met een afgesproken regelmaat, tegen een afgesproken tarief uw Wifi-infrastructuur te komen controleren en optimaliseren.

Flexibel en betaalbaar
Onze tarieven zijn scherp en concurrerend. Desgewenst krijg u vooraf een gespecificeerde offerte, op basis van het aantal werkplekken, het aantal vierkante meters en het aantal verdiepingen. Op die manier komt u nooit achteraf voor onaangename verrassingen te staan.

Maak een afspraak
Bel nu voor een afspraak of stuur een mailtje. onze expert komt langs voor vrijblijvende opname van de huidige situatie en het vaststellen van de problemen en/of behoeftes. Wij zorgen dat uw Wifi zo snel mogelijk (weer) up and running is.

Cependant, hors mis les offres de communications mobiles, les reste des activités NTIC restent embryonnaires : le taux de pénétration internet reste des plus bas en Afrique, les offres des solutions web ou SMS sont quasi inexistantes, les
solutions technologiques offertes sont soit inadaptées soit hors de portée des consommateurs potentiels.

 C’est dans ce contexte que la société PCG ONLINE fut créée pour répondre aux besoins du secteur des NTIC au Congo et partout en Afrique centrale.

 La formation constitue un axe développement stratégique pour la société PCG ONLINE. Aussi toute une division a été créée avec du personnel dédié pour gérer le produit « Formation » au sein de l’entreprise.   

 L’objectif de PCG ONLINE est d’être la première société de consulting en matière de Technologie et de SI au Congo d’ici à 2025 ; elle se propose d’améliorer la performance des entreprises en leur offrant non seulement les outils informatiques (logiciels et matériels) adaptés mais également le personnel technique qualifié à travers son panel de consultants qualifiés

Name: Valor Connect
Description:
Our mission is to help people find and capitalize on career opportunities. We build applications that help make networking easy for students, alumni, and professionals. We believe that people are your #1 asset and that connecting with the right people can help anyone advance their career.

For many, networking, specifically attending networking events, can feel like going into battle. You put on your best business attire, style your hair, stock business cards in your pocket, prep your elevator pitch and pump yourself up to walk into that room of 100+ people you don't know yet. That's why we created Valor - to give you courage in those networking battles.

Valor, our latest innovative product, offers a cutting-edge new approach to finding and connecting with the type of people you're interested in meeting. We ditched the traditional directory-based "outbound" networking approach that was both time-consuming and ineffective. Instead, we revolutionized the concept of "inbound" networking - bringing the best potential new contacts directly to you.

All you do is input basic information (tags) about who you are professionally and the type of people you're interested in meeting professionally. Valor analyzes and compares your data against other users info to determine professional compatibility, then presents you with your best "potential matches" one-by-one on your phone.

From there, simply swipe left or right to anonymously indicate if you're interested in connecting. When the interest is mutual, a match forms and you can chat with the person directly within the app. It's that simple.

Check us out and register for the launch at www.valorapp.com! If you're a school interested in utilizing Valor to help interconnect your alumni network and/or help students easily find alumni mentors, contact our campus partnerships team directly at team@valorapp.com.

Valor | Network Differently

Name: Optical Development Solutions
Description:
Welcome to Optical Development Solutions (ODS), the pioneer in innovative and patented fiber optic solutions. Our advanced process and measurement applications transform industries by delivering unparalleled reliability and performance. Using the latest technologies, ODS is revolutionizing the fiber optic sector and setting new standards of excellence.

Our solutions cater to a diverse range of markets, including:

-Residential Market (Fiber to the Home, FTTH): Providing high-speed internet, television, and telephone services directly to homes.

-Business Market (Fiber to the Business, FTTB): Offering high bandwidth and reliable fiber optic connections to businesses and offices.

-Fiber to the Premises (FTTP): Bringing fiber optic to the doorstep of both residential and commercial buildings.

-Fiber to the Curb (FTTC) or Fiber to the Cabinet (FTTCab): Connecting fiber optic to neighborhood cabinets and bridging the final meters with copper wire.

-Data Centers and Cloud Providers: Supporting extremely high bandwidths and reliability for data processing and storage.

-Mobile Backhaul: Connecting mobile cell sites to the core network for 4G and 5G services.

-Transport and Infrastructure Markets: Ensuring reliable communication for critical infrastructures such as railways, highways, and airports.

-Healthcare: Transmitting large medical images and data for hospitals and medical facilities.

-Education Sector: Providing high-speed internet and networks for research, online learning, and administration in schools and universities.

-Smart Cities and IoT (Internet of Things): Supporting smart city infrastructures and IoT devices.

-Offshore Market: Monitoring energy sea cables to ensure the reliability and safety of underwater energy transmission.

Join us and lead the future of fiber optic technology. For more information, visit opticalds.com or contact us via info@opticalds.com

Name: CACE Technologies
Description:
CACE Technologies Inc. is the sponsor and innovative force behind Wireshark and WinPcap, the world’s most widely used Open Source network traffic capture and analysis tools.

The company develops cutting-edge network analysis and troubleshooting products that complement Wireshark’s prodigious packet inspection capabilities.

The CACE Shark Distributed Monitoring System provides enterprise-class, end-to-end network monitoring and analytics capabilities and extends the Wireshark experience into distributed network environments.

Known for its user-friendly modular products, the company offers the most cost-effective analysis solutions for modern enterprise networks. For more information visit www.cacetech.com.

We are excited to announce that CACE Technologies has been acquired by Riverbed Technology.

Netcordia's NetMRI software solution, which is now offered by Infoblox, enables users to automate network change, manage network configurations and meet compliance. NetMRI audits multi-vendor infrastructures, identifies anomalies early, speeds resolution, and automates network changes. NetMRI helps hundreds of leading organizations in healthcare, manufacturing, financial services, academic, service and government improve service quality, reduce total cost of ownership and mitigate risk of poor performance.

Name: COMPET'plus
Description:
COMPET'plus mugaz gaindiko lankidetza-proiektua da.  Enpresen lehiakortasuna eta ETEen berrikuntza sustatu nahi du, Akitania Berriaren, Euskadiren eta Nafarroaren artean mugaz gaindiko eta I+G+b-ren alorreko lankidetzaren bidez. Hona hemen bazkideak: Baiona-Euskal Herriko Merkataritza Ganbara (taldeburua), Gipuzkoako Bazkundea, Lehiakortasunerako Euskal Institutua - Orkestra, Nafarroako Garapena - Sodena eta Akitania-Berria Euskadi Nafarroa Euroeskualdea.
COMPET’ plus Eskualde Garapeneko Europako Funtsaren (FEDER) bidez finantzatuta dago % 65ean, Interreg V-A Espainia-Frantzia-Andorra (POCTEFA 2014-2020) programaren bidez. 
 COMPET'plus es un proyecto europeo que busca impulsar la competitividad empresarial y la innovación de las pymes a través de la cooperación entre Nueva Aquitania, Euskadi y Navarra en materia de I+D+i. Participan como socios la Cámara de Comercio de Bayona PaysBasque (jefe de fila), la Cámara de Comercio de Gipuzkoa, el Instituto Vasco de Competitividad -  Orkestra, la Sociedad de Desarrollo Económico de Navarra-SODENA y la Eurorregión Nouvelle-Aquitaine Euskadi Navarra. 
Está financiado al 65% por el Fondo Europeo de Desarrollo Regional (FEDER) a través del Programa Interreg V-A España-Francia-Andorra (POCTEFA 2014-2020). 
 #Competplus est un projet européen qui vise à promouvoir la compétitivité des entreprises et l'innovation dans les PME par le biais de la coopération transfrontalière de Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Euskadi et Navarre en matière de R+D+I. Il a la participation de ces partenaires : la Chambre de Commerce de Bayonne-Pays Basque (chef de file), la Chambre de Commerce du Gipuzkoa, l'Institut Basque de Compétitivité - Orkestra, la Société de Développement Économique de Navarre-SODENA et l'Eurorégion Nouvelle-Aquitaine - Euskadi - Navarre.
Le projet  est financé à hauteur de 65 % par le Fonds Européen de Développement Régional (FEDER), par le biais du programme Interreg V-A Espagne-France-Andorre (POCTEFA 2014-2020).

Name: EG Corporate
Description:
EG Corporate est né de la passion et du dévouement d'Esthefany Guillermo.
 Avec une carrière de mannequin pour de grands magazines en Italie et des études en communication qui l'ont amenée dès son plus jeune âge à devenir Responsable Marketing d'un Centre de Chirurgie Esthétique considéré comme le fleuron de Milan (Groupe Médical Esthétique) fréquenté par de nombreuses stars.  Suite à de nombreux cours de développement personnel et de marketing accompagnés des meilleurs coachs internationaux, elle s'est ensuite concentrée sur la formation, à ce jour, elle a aidé de nombreuses personnes à atteindre leurs objectifs et à avoir des résultats en ligne.
 Ainsi EG CORPORATE est né avec une vision plus large.  Aidez le plus de personnes possible à apprendre tout en restant autonome et à créer une indépendance financière grâce à la technologie.  Souvent, les solutions proposées sur le marché se transforment en explications complexes qui conduisent à l'inaction sur le long terme.
 La mission est que chacun puisse comprendre l'importance des la création d'entreprise en utilisant la tecnologie et surtout de la technologie en les utilisant pour vraiment gagner et pas seulement pour consommer du contenu. On peux créer une entreprise de zero!

Name: Raha Engineering Company
Description:
شرکت مهندسی رها از سال ۱۳۷۵ در زمینه های فن آوری اطلاعات و ارتباطات و آموزش شروع به فعالیت نمود و در سال ۱۳۷۹ آموزشگاه آزاد فنی و حرفه ای تاسیس نمود و سپس با ادغام چند شرکت دیگر اکنون بصورت مجموعه ای متشکل از چند شرکت در حوزه های :

    فاوا (فناوری اطلاعات و ارتباطات)
    انرژی و محیط زیست
    برق
    مدیریت و صنایع
    عمران و معماری
    نرم افزار

با مجموعه نمایندگانی فعال در ۱۳ استان کشور مشغول به ارائه خدماتی از قبیل :

مشاوره ، محاسبات ، آموزش ، استاندارد سازی ، نظارت ، تامین تجهیزات ، اجرا ، رفع عیب ، پشتیبانی و تامین نیروی متخصص مقیم، فعالیت مینماید.

مجموعه شرکت های مهندسی دانش بنیان رها با عضویت در مراکز و اتحادیه هایی همچون سازمان نظام صنفی رایانه ،سامانه تدارکات دولت و…و همچنین همکاری با ارگان ها و سازمان هایی چون وزارت کشور ، وزارت آموزش و پرورش ، نهاد رهبری، بانک ها ، انرژی اتمی ، صنعت برق کشور و بیمه و…به لحاظ اعتبار و دانش جزء شرکت های تراز اول حوزه دانش بنیان و مجازی سازی میباشد.

واحد تحقیق و توسعه
واحد تحقیق و توسعه ی مجموعه ضمن استقرار در شهرک علمی تحقیقاتی و قرار دادن مجموعه در رسته شرکت های دانش بنیان با بهره گیری از نخبه های هر حوزه و ارائه طرحهای بسیار و عملیاتی و تجاری سازی برخی از آنها ضمن تحقیق و پژوهش در خصوص تکنولوژی و تولید علم و بکارگیری آن در امر تولید، قصد آن دارد تا با ایجاد زمینه ها و فرصت های جدید ضمن گسترش مجموعه با افزایش تولید بومی علم و تکنولوژی و ایجاد اشتغال، گامی در جهت توسعه تکنولوژیک منطقه بردارد .

واحد آموزش

واحد آموزش مجموعه نیز با ثبت به عنوان آموزشگاه آزاد فنی و حرفه ای در سال ۱۳۷۹ و همچنین دریافت مجوز از وزارت صنایع و معادن و آموزش استانداری، با بهره گیری از نخبه های مجموعه، با ارائه آموزش هایی تخصصی و کاربردی ضمن تربیت دانشجویانی کار آمد و معرفی آنها به بازار کار از طریق مختلف، که تعامل با جامعه ی مشتریان مجموعه (بالغ بر ۱۷۰۰مورد) از جمله آنها می باشد.قصد آن دارد تا در جهت اشتغالزایی تخصصی و پایدار حرکت کند.

Name: Korzystne.IT
Description:
Witamy Państwa na stronie spółki „Korzystne.IT” i dziękujemy za zainteresowanie naszą ofertą. Firma ma charakter integratorski. Celem jej działania jest zapewnienie kompleksowej obsługi informatycznej przedsiębiorstw – począwszy od zaprojektowania środowiska IT, poprzez dostawę sprzętu i oprogramowania, wdrożenia i integracje, na utrzymaniu, serwisie i usługach zarządzania kończąc.
Projekt „Korzystne.IT” jest wynikiem i kontynuacją naszego wieloletniego doświadczenia w branży IT, z którą obaj zawodowo jesteśmy związani od 2009 roku. Oddajemy do Państwa dyspozycji nie tylko nasze doświadczenie, wypracowane kontakty - ale przede wszystkim - chęć ciągłego doskonalenia się. Zdobywamy wiedzę o nowinkach technologicznych, szukamy nowych trendów na rynku IT, jako hasło przewodnie obraliśmy sobie „EXPECT MORE” – bo swoje usługi dedykujemy wszystkim z Państwa, którzy od partnera technologicznego oczekują więcej.

Genom att publicera uppdrag riktade mot vårt nätverk av Finders når du tusentals potentiella anställda, kunder, leverantörer och samarbetspartners. Name: Information Security and Digital Forensics Research Foundation
Description:
Information Security and Digital Forensics Research Foundation (ISDFRF) is established as a research and certification foundation, incorporated in the United States. The primary objective of this foundation is to support and encourage education and research in emerging areas of information security and digit al forensics. As a first step, ISDFRF is establishing a framework and process for evaluation and certification of knowledge, skills and competencies of individuals; particularly in areas related to information security and digital forensics.

Validated projections point to significant increase in the demand for professionals with skills in information security and digital forensics. This demand is driven by the rapidly increasing numbers in cybercrimes being committed and the steadily increasing losses due to cyber crimes. The battle against cyber crimes is being fought at different levels with various stakeholders pitching their best to combat this menace. However,the amount of loss keeps increasing by the day. It is in this context that ISDFRF sees its role in protecting digital assets and help investigate digital crimes through the creation of a global pool of competent individuals.

Name: GLORIAD
Description:
GLORIAD’s history begins over 10 years ago. The seeds of GLORIAD were planted when the U.S. National Science Foundation and the Russian Ministry of Science agreed to jointly fund the first advanced US-Russia network, which launched as MIRnet with 6 mbps of ATM service in 1998.  The next version of the network was known as FASTnet, which in 2001 operated with 45 mbps service.  By 2002, the network had evolved into NaukaNet, with 155 mbps service between Russia and the U.S.  
Ongoing expansion of the network topology by organizers and sponsors led to a 2004 launch of the U.S.-China-Russia “Little GLORIAD” network, completing the first ring of light  for science and education around the earth. A new trans-Pacific segment connecting the U.S., Korea and China at 10 Gbps (60x original capacity) was realized in 2005; in 2006, the U.S.-China portion of GLORIAD was upgraded by a factor of 16, from 155 Mbps to 2.5 Gbps; and in 2007 the U.S.-Russia upgrade to nearly 4 Gbps via cooperation with the University of Illinois at Chicago-based TransLight project and with Tata Communications. GLORIAD in Canada provides equipment, high speed circuits and expertise to provide GLORIAD transit across North America.  GLORIAD in the Netherlands contributes more than 20 Gbps to connect the U.S. and Europe, and NORDUnet has provided connectivity across Northern Europe and Russia since 2007. 
Today, GLORIAD is based in the U.S. at the University of Tennessee. In January 2005, a $4.2 million grant from the U.S. National Science Foundation, along with an international package of funding provided via GLORIAD international partners and Tata Communications, provided five more years of funding for GLORIAD’s network operations and support of advanced applications development.  Total U.S. NSF funding for GLORIAD and its MIRnet/NaukaNet predecessors is now $10.1 million.  Non-U.S. GLORIAD partner financial contributions are estimated to be approximately 10 times this amount.

Name: freebit
Description:
http://www.freebit.com/en/roadmap/index.html

FreeBit provides essential components (core components) necessary to create new Internet services that do not depend on Web browsers or PCs.

Much like a car’s engine or the CPU of a PC, FreeBit’s core components are capable of creating various products and services.

FreeBit focuses on developing core components that serve as the basis for its services.

For example, as with a plastic model, components optimized for a specific purpose can only create a specific object. However, components conceived for the purpose of making combinations, such as toy building blocks, can be used for many different things.

FreeBit’s core components are created to develop varied services through their combinations.


FreeBit does not only provide, for example, the engine (core component) that makes the car run, but also the chassis, steering wheel, tires and other components necessary to create products and services.
In the same way, FreeBit provides diverse internet products and services by combining various components.

DVS Cabling étudie, installe et maintient votre réseau courant faible avec ses connaissances pointues et ses outils spécialement adaptés.

Name: SYN-bit • deep traffic analysis
Description:
Deep Traffic Analysis

The importance of communication between end-users and applications is increasing. This is even more true for communication between applications. The communication itself is becoming more and more complex. The result is an increasing chance on disruptions, while the business impact of each disruption is also increasing. 

SYN-bit helps its customers to remedy these disruptions. We do this by digging deep into the traffic streams, pinpointing what goes wrong (at bit level if necessary). Usually some minor configuration errors are found. But we have also found bugs in the appliances used for the solution. We help our customers in their contact with the vendor to get the bug solved.

SYN-bit has deep knowledge of and experience with Application Delivery Networks, datacenter solutions to achieve application optimization based on appliances from F5 Networks, Alteon and Cisco ACE. But our broad experience makes us useful in other environments too.

It is the philosophy of SYN-bit to enable the customer to solve their disruptions themselves to minimize the impact of these disruptions. We do that by offering tailored training and coaching programs to improve the problem solving capabilities of the engineers of our customers.

If you would to use the services of SYN-bit, please contact us by e-mail at info@SYN-bit.nl

Name: Digital Premium Jornais
Description:
A Rede Digital Premium Jornais é uma ad network em que você anuncia simultaneamente nas versões digitais dos 65 principais jornais do país, com formato premium e exclusivo. Tem entrega de 10 milhões de impressões em média por dia e impacta todos os usuários que acessam os jornais pela homepage ou pelos editoriais, alcançando 7 milhões de pessoas nas versões desktop e mobile. É a plataforma de mídia mais qualificada do Brasil e, em 2016, foi vencedora na categoria Lançamento do Ano no XII Prêmio ANATEC, o maior prêmio de mídia segmentada do país.

A Rede é formada por um pool de mais de 65 jornais que cobrem todo o Brasil, entre eles: Folha de São Paulo, Estadão, O Globo, Zero Hora, O Lance, Correio Braziliense, O Povo, Gazeta do Povo entre outros. 

_escala_
A Rede Digital Premium é a plataforma de mídia mais qualificada do país e está entre as 10 maiores propriedades da internet, segundo dados da comScore.


_conteúdo único_
Os 65 principais jornais do Brasil contam com os melhores jornalistas do país, oferecendo conteúdo de própria autoria que os tornam as fontes mais confiáveis de notícias, afinal, quando há um boato, é sempre no jornal que os usuários buscam a informação verdadeira.


_brand safety_
Os jornais que formam a rede estão sempre próximos ao público, entregando conteúdo que realmente importa na vida das pessoas. Associar a marca do seu cliente a esses jornais é associá-la à responsabilidade, credibilidade, verdade e confiança


_cobertura_
Com cobertura nacional, está em 50 cidades espalhadas em mais de 20 estados. Com poder global, mas com um olhar local, associa sua marca aos mais confiáveis jornais de cada região do país.

_entrega_
São 10 milhões de impressões por dia que impactam 7 milhões de pessoas, em média, nas versões desktop e mobile dos jornais que compõem o Digital Premium. Além disso, a rede opera com um formato premium e exclusivo de alto impacto e viewability, fazendo sua campanha ser realmente vista e não apenas exibida.

_inovação_
Negociação com apenas um interlocutor, que coloca sua campanha em todos os jornais, poupando tempo e garantindo a entrega. Além disso, você poder acompanhar os resultados de forma rápida e eficiente.

Para mais informações acesse:
www.digitalpremiumjornais.com.br

Name: Flowgrammable
Description: Flowgrammable.org is a coalition of researchers and industry engineers dedicated to improving adoption of software-defined networks and networking. Flow-level SDN, enabled by widely reusable and reused COTS network processors, is enabling an unprecedented level of software innovation opportunity. Early pioneers have often marked SDN as the dawn of a new level of "simplified networking", but such claims are struggling to be fully realized as important abstractions remain undefined. Flowgrammable seeks to fill the gap with an end-to-end vision of flow-level SDN and targeted tools to accelerate application development, network deployment, and system testing.

Description:
Data Cabling Solutions is a Midlands based communications cabling provider with 14 years’ experience in the telecoms and networking industry. We provide cabling to business with the clear ethos of honest, reliable service at a competitive cost.

We know that cabling is what we provide but this isn’t all our customers require. Service is as important as the physical solution. We always endeavour to provide both the solution and the product to so our customers are satisfied and will come back to us and refer us to other companies in need of cabling.

Below are the types of cabling we provide:

•	Telephone or CW1308 

•	Category 5E

•	Category 6 
 
•	Category 6A 

•	Fibre Optic 

Reasons to choose and work with Data Cabling solutions:

- Accreditation and qualifications:

o	Our engineers are trained to and accredited by City and Guilds with the 3667 Level 2 Communications Cabling Full award.

o	Enhanced DBS checked

o	Asbestos Awareness fully certified by NATAS (National Asbestos Training & Accreditation Scheme) 

- Dedicated to cabling and associated installations
What makes Data Cabling Solutions different is that we are dedicated cabling installers and this is our sole focus. We are committed to providing the right advice which then means our customers have the right solution.

- Flexibility
Where possible we will always accommodate our customers to make the installation as easy and have the lowest impact on their organisation. 

- Leaving site tidy
We always tidy up after we have finished working to make sure we don’t create extra work after we have finished our installation. We also take away, when practical any rubbish and recycle as much as possible. 

- Building relationships
Whilst we provide cabling services we know that customers require more than this. We want to build lasting relationships, and that our customers are looked after through the whole process and for any future work that is needed.

Name: 晓通网络科技有限公司
Description:
北京晓通网络科技有限公司（简称"晓通网络"）成立于1990年，并于2001年成为浙大网新（上证代码600797）旗下成员企业之一，注册资本2亿元人民币。

    晓通网络是一家专注于网络产品销售和增值服务业务的高科技企业，是国内最具实力的专业化网络公司之一，分支机构遍及全国21个大中城市，年销营业额达到35亿元人民币。

    晓通网络作为中国最成功的网络产品分销商之一，一直执着“把握网络主流”，代理思科（Cisco）、康普(CommScope)、派尔高(Pelco)、安讯士（Axis）、伊顿（Eaton）等国际知名品牌。其中智能建筑事业部代理产品涵盖了数据中心、安防监控及智能楼宇的全系列。晓通的业务取得了非常傲人的成绩，屡获"中国最佳分销商"称号以及"最佳合作伙伴"称号。

    同时，晓通网络一直秉承"用户至上"的信念。为了能提供更好的服务，成立了专门的增值服务部门，为合作伙伴和用户提供技术支持、外包服务、零部件更换等服务及产品，同时提供专业化网络认证培训及其他为用户定制的培训课程。
    2004年，电脑商报"首届中国电脑商500强"组委会特别为晓通网络颁发了"最佳网络产品专业分销奖"，2005年，晓通网络在互联网周刊"中国电信供应商百佳榜"榜上有名，2007年，晓通网络位列《计算机产品与流通》十大分销商金榜 ,并为《电脑商报》中国电脑商500强之分销商150强之前10名。至今，晓通网络历年都被IT专业媒体列为全国十大分销商之一。这一系列的荣誉充分见证了晓通网络作为国内专业化网络分销企业的雄厚实力。

Name: Uninet Data Communications
Description:
Uninet Data Communications (Unineti Andmeside; initially named Nösper) was one of the key players on Estonian sprouting ISP scene in mid-90's. The company was founded by Taavi Talvik and Andres Bauman to provide Internet connections and e-mail services for local customers.

Uninet was one of the two first Estonian ISPs implementing its own international Internet connection. Uninet was the first Estonian ISP launching residential and commercial ADSL connections.

In the end of 90's the Finnish company Finnet International (which was in fact Department of International Operations of Elisa Corporation) bought a significant part in Uninet and some years later Uninet was wholly incorporated into Elisa Estonia.

https://et.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uninet

In 1989,  Small Business Solutions, Inc. was formed with the officers,  Ronald McCallister and Larisa Slezak. As a company,  we help small businesses save money by giving them the correct tools to purchase computer equipment and software. Service Contracten (SLA)

Name: Draba LLC.
Description:
Draba is a curated digital marketplace that connects buyers to unique creative goods and services, provided by local sellers. This creates a peer-to-peer marketplace that focuses on local alternative areas of creative commerce typically neglected by mainstream content providers.  

Draba amplifies exposure and visibility for local art, music, performance, food and beverage, film, fashion, literature, and digital content to cultivate a community where self-expression flourishes and thrives. Through its content distribution and discovery platform, Draba helps publishers, brands, and business grow traffic while reaching highly motivated patrons that can expand their reach to new and larger audiences.

Draba aggregates local independent activity, culture, and events in one marketplace.  Localized community consumers are given a vote for every contribution and have the opportunity to dictate what is displayed on top of the feed of a localities homepage.  In return, Draba generates a real-time, crowdsourced feed of the best culture in the local area.  This feed is based on the number of votes, which provides individuals with the opportunity to display their goods/services with a higher chance of conversion for that specific buyer. 

We offer an alternative to the advertisement model by eradicating bias from advertisement revenue and the opportunity to support marginalized creatives.  Draba equalizes opportunities for alternative markets based on the strength of their ideas and favorable reviews from local consumers. This allows anyone the opportunity to have his or her content viewed.

We all know blockchain will be the next big thing. But it's kinda a big pain to use blockchain apps. It's too slow for the response, too complicated to deal with wallets, and too scary to keep the tokens safe.

Name: kissbox-nl
Description:
The Network Answer
 
Technology and its related fields have become a very demanding business. As audiences all over the world are ever more expecting to be amazed visiting theme-parks, museums, live shows, movies and many other types of venues, designing the technical solutions that are needed to be able to create and control the complex systems for these settings can be challenging.
Ethernet has become the standard transport method for a wide variety of protocols. It has found its way from the office environment in to many other areas where low-cost and high reliability networking is required.
Within the entertainment industry we see a growing trend in using the Ethernet as the preferred infrastructure, more and more control systems are evolving into network based distributed systems.
Using our Transceiver solutions can greatly simplify the control protocol handling in your system.
KissBox provides flexible solutions to transmit-receive and control protocol-data like MIDI, DMX, RS232/422/485, LTC-Timecode, Contact-Closure, Analog Control-voltage and more, over standard Ethernet networks, with minimum and controlled latency.
KissBox gives you the possibility to set up a distributed control network, utilising standard “off the shelf” Ethernet infrastructure building blocks. In addition to our control system products we also offer a range of solutions for computer based musical systems.
KissBox is one of the frontrunners when it comes to transporting the Midi protocol over Ethernet, and interfacing with “non network” based musical equipment.

Name: Hired On The Spot.com
Description:
Hired on the Spot, revolutionizing the way online job hunting is done, launched its Web site www.hiredonthespot.com.

The company takes a unique approach to the job search challenge by incorporating social networking, allowing users to connect with others through blogging, as well as viral marketing to maximize visibility and differentiate themselves from other job seekers. 

“We take an action-oriented approach emphasizing the three key steps to the job hunt ─ Take Action, Get Noticed, Get Hired ─ and use today’s technology to enhance the experience.” 

Job seekers can create comprehensive employment profiles on the Hired on the Spot Web site. The company advocates a Resume Revolution, emphasizing that an individual’s uniqueness can’t be reduced to a traditional resume alone. 

Resumes are created using a proprietary quick-search format highlighting skills, employment history and education. Responses to open-ended questions such as “Why am I a great employee?” highlight additional characteristics and attributes. Candidates also create video resumes and industry blogs. To enhance their visibility, they order t-shirts imprinted with their resume! 

Hired on the Spot is an effective solution for employers who can save up to 75 percent on the cost of posting jobs. It also provides a go-to spot for insightful information on candidates. Both job postings and job seeker information are accessible through Internet search engines, another advantage of the site. 

Hired On the Spot Hired on the Spot provides innovative job hunting support to job seekers and employers to increase the effectiveness of their search strategies. 

Its online site, www.hiredonthespot.com, advocates taking a proactive approach to job hunting by incorporating social media for network building and viral marketing to maximize visibility. 

For more information go to www.hiredonthespot.com

Name: 青岛海洋科学与技术试点国家实验室
Description:
青岛海洋科学与技术试点国家实验室（以下简称“海洋试点国家实验室”）于2013年12月获得科技部批复、2015年6月正式运行，由国家部委、山东省、青岛市共同建设，定位于围绕国家海洋发展战略，以重大科技任务攻关和国家大型科技基础设施为主线，开展战略性、前瞻性、基础性、系统性、集成性科技创新，依托青岛、服务全国、面向世界，着力突破世界前沿的重大科学问题，攻克事关国家核心竞争力和经济社会可持续发展的关键核心技术，率先掌握能形成先发优势、引领未来发展的颠覆性技术，建成引领世界科技发展的高地、代表国家海洋科技水平的战略科技力量、世界科技强国的重要标志和促进人类文明进步的世界主要科技中心。

建成协同创新的科研体系，开展重大科技任务攻关。聚焦国家长远目标和重大需求，以开展基础前沿研究为目标，以不断突破世界前沿的重大科学问题为牵引，重点汇聚青岛优势单元力量组建8个功能实验室。以国家战略需求为导向，以海洋战略性前沿技术体系构建与自主装备研制及产业化为目标，汇聚国内优势力量，已建成5个联合实验室，在建3个联合实验室。围绕瞄准国际科技前沿、率先形成先发优势的目标，面向国内院士和国际顶尖科学家及其团队建设开放工作室，引领开展颠覆性技术创新，已组建3个开放工作室。

稳步推进大型科技基础设施建设。按照“增量带动存量”的原则，通过共享满意后补贴的方式，高效共享各类大型科研仪器设备，为科研人员提供优质科研条件，为科学研究提供支撑服务。已建成高性能科学计算与系统仿真平台、科学考察船共享平台、海洋创新药物筛选与评价平台，正在建设海洋同位素与地质年代测试平台、海洋高端仪器设备研发平台、海洋分子生物技术公共实验平台。未来将根据国家战略发展需要和国际海洋科技发展趋势，适时组建相关公共科研平台。

实行人员分类管理。遵循“按需设岗、按岗聘用、合同管理、动态调整、能进能出”的原则，探索建立开放、流动、竞争、协同的用人机制。实行科研人员“双聘制”、管理服务人员“职员制”；科研人员采用专家评估考核制，管理服务人员采用定期逐级考核制，最大限度激发人员创新潜力。实施“鳌山人才”计划，面向全球选聘各层次科技创新人才。已汇聚了一支含30位两院院士、19位千人计划专家、63位国家杰青和17位长江学者的2200余人的科技队伍。

广泛开展国际合作，助力打造海洋与气候人类命运共同体。南北并重、东西共举，在全球规划布局5个国外分中心。与澳大利亚联邦科学与工业研发组织合作，在霍巴特市合作建成国际南半球海洋研究中心；与美国国家大气研究中心和美国德州农工大学签署协议备忘录，在大学城合作建设国际高分辨率地球系统预测实验室。

以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指引，按照创新驱动发展战略和建设海洋强国的总体要求，力争到“十三五”末，初步构建“核心+网络”的组织架构，科研队伍规模达到4000人，推动建立中央管理和理事会、学术委员会、主任分工负责的新型管理体制，建立目标导向、绩效管理、协同攻关、开放共享的新型运行机制，建成突破型、引领型、平台型一体化的大型综合性研究基地，打造体现国家意志、实现国家使命、代表国家水平的战略科技力量。

Name: Script N'Go
Description:
ScriptN’Go is an Enterprise grade Network Automation Tool and Python Scripting Platform designed to mass configure thousands of devices.

ScriptN’Go is free for private, non-commercial, non-business use.

Overview

ScriptN’Go is a lightweight, scriptable, programmable and extensible .NET based network configuration desktop application designed to mass-configure networking devices, such as Cisco or Juniper routers and switches and supports SSH / Telnet connections over multiple jump servers.

Philosophy is simple : the less is sometimes the more. Why?

- Because you won’t need to learn any proprietary scripting languages. ScriptN’Go fully supports Python scripting and script debugging for Visual Scripts and standard Python script files.

- Because you won’t need to integrate a dozen of different open-source platforms. Although many of them are considered “industry standard”, the more external platforms are involved in a deployment, the more difficult is to maintain integrity, independence and reliability. A pure Python script is what it is. Combined with CLI commands it is easy to understand and it does not depend on any other 3rd part software.

- Because ScriptN’Go is lightweight. Due to its small footprint, ScriptN’Go does not require a dedicated administrator performing gardening tasks to maintain a complex environment. Yet it is very effective in most day-by-day activities what network operators and administrators usually perform.

Available on Windows platforms supporting the .NET 4.5 framework.

Name: Drop Me
Description:
PROBLEMA

La polución, los atascos y el limitado número de plazas de aparcamiento es una problemática creciente hoy en día. Y esto afecta no sólo a nivel global (emisiones de C02) sino también a nivel de usuario; trayectos más largos, mayor jornada laboral, estrés, y en definitiva, menor rendimiento laboral o universitario.



SOLUCIÓN

El concepto de carpooling o coche compartido existe desde finales de la II guerra mundial. Es un sistema establecido y fijado en el día a día de infinidad de países, a destacar los de la zona euro, en donde el 86% de la población utiliza o ha utilizado alguna vez un sistema de transporte privado con pago a terceros.



LA SOLUCIÓN NO ESTÁ SIENDO SUFICIENTE

Sin embargo en España, a excepción de los trayectos largos no está funcionando. 73% de los encuestados por "Daily travel" se consideran reacios a compartir diariamente vehículo para ir al trabajo o a la facultad. Las razones principales son el rechazo a viajar con un desconocido y el engorro que supone gestionar diariamente una reserva en este sentido.



QUÉ OFRECE DAILY TRAVEL

Proponemos un sistema de carpooling diario 100% integrado a nivel de empresa o universidad. Nuestra aplicación se ofrece a las compañías y son ellas, las que, de la mano nuestra pero a través de su sistema interno, realizan las gestiones y diligencias pertinentes para que el usuario final sólo tenga que aceptar el viaje a golpe de clic, y además, con alguien de su misma corporación.


EN QUÉ FASE ESTAMOS

Actualmente tenemos hecho el front end y el diseño de la app, analizada la competencia, detallado el modelo de negocio y un road map a tres años. Así como decidida la empresa de programación, que nos ha presupuestado la primera versión piloto en unos 15.000 euros. Es un capital que estamos dispuestos a poner de nuestros fondos propios, pero queríamos hacer una primera ronda por si nos lo pudiese invertir algún
