Name: BLOQE
Description:
BLOQE was created to build affordable websites for small to medium sized businesses.

Before BLOQE there was a disconnect between small businesses and affordable technology. We found that the market was saturated with quick website builders and other Do-It-Yourself models that were affordable; but didn’t produce the results businesses demanded. To clarify, the templates being used for development were lacking the custom look they required to STAND OUT. Additionally, the lack of customization  often left mobile users with a boring, and in some cases poorly accessible site.

Companies that demanded a better web presence were forced to:

1 Settle for the Do-It-Yourself Model
2 Hire a freelancer and hope for the best
3 Hire an agency (pay thousands of dollars for results)

We conducted 8 months of : Research, Planning, and Recruiting before taking on our first project. In that 8 months we created a streamlined development process that produces affordable websites with superior quality. The major obstacle we faced when creating our development process was finding a way to facilitate rapid development without loss in quality. To clarify, we wanted to create custom websites that were optimized for mobile, SEO Friendly and bug-free without taking weeks in production. Days turned to months as we inched closer to our original goal. Finally, after 8 months of refinement we reached our goal. Our team was able to produce websites that surpassed our original goals in terms of: Quality, Usability, and Production Time. The result allows BLOQE to create custom, mobile-friendly websites, in 7 days or less. We are proud to offer a pragmatic solution for small to medium sized businesses that demand quality technology that is both affordable and created specifically for them. Our hard work has truly created a paradigm in “Affordable Web Development “.

Name: Technology Development Center, Inc.
Description:
The TDC Managed Services Program

The TDC Managed Services Program is TDC Inc.’s premier managed service offering. This offering moves beyond the typical service provider paradigm to a business technology partnership. With this program, TDC makes a commitment to ensure that your critical business systems will be available when you need them.

Services Included in the TDC Program
_Remote monitoring and management by the Primewatch and Primeguard Network Operations Centers
_Remote and onsite support of all users during business hours
_Scheduled after-hours support (on and offsite) 
_Emergency Support

Pricing

The cost of the TDC program is based on the number of devices and users that are being supported, as well as the guaranteed service level included. 

TDC is a “pay one price” per month program, based on a minimum 12-month commitment.

Guaranteed Availability

The availability guarantee will be defined and included in Appendix A at the time the contract is signed. Reporting generated by the Primewatch and Primeguard management systems will be used to measure the actual availability. Should a device not meet the guaranteed availability level over the course of one month, TDC will compensate you 25% of the monthly contract fee per device up to the value of the monthly contract.

Name: 21Conecta
Description:
A síndrome de Down ou trissomia do 21 é uma condição genética que ocorre durante ou logo após a concepção do embrião humano. Os seres humanos possuem 46 cromossomos no núcleo de cada célula, sendo distribuídos em 23 pares combinados. A pessoa com síndrome de Down possui material extra no cromossomo do par 21, que é identificada com três cromossomos ao invés de dois. A T21 está associada em menor ou maior grau de comprometimento neuropsicomotor e, em alguns casos, a outros diagnósticos relacionados.

A primeira coisa que uma família faz ao receber o diagnóstico nos dias de hoje, certamente, é buscar informações sobre o que pode e o que deve ser feito. Diante de uma realidade de muitos desafios e aprendizados, a 21Conecta se propõe ser uma rede, ser ponte, ser facilitadora para as famílias e para os profissionais que convivem diariamente com o mundo da trissomia do 21 (síndrome de Down).

Através de uma plataforma, conectaremos famílias a profissionais e instituições que possuem experiência no atendimento de pessoas com a trissomia do 21. Aqui as famílias encontrarão o direcionamento que necessitam de forma mais objetiva e dinâmica possível. 

Com muito amor e empatia iremos trilhar este caminho junto às famílias e todas as pessoas envolvidas, com vistas a um mundo de oportunidades e conquistas.

Seja 21Conecta. Venha também fazer parte desta Comunidade!

Name: Startup Weekend Music & Arts
Description:
O evento de imersão Techstars Startup Weekend está com inscrições abertas. Esta será a primeira edição com o tema 'Music & Arts' que acontecerá no último final de semana de março, nos dias 27, 28 e 29 de março de 2020, no Museu de Arte Moderna de São Paulo (MAM). 

O evento é uma experiência única onde empreendedores e aspirantes podem descobrir se suas ideias de startups são viáveis. E para isso, não é necessário ter ideias formadas ou conhecimento técnico avançado, de acordo com a produção do evento, todos são bem-vindos para expor suas ideias.

Os participantes devem se inscrever em apenas uma das 4 áreas (Music & Arts, Negócios, Design ou Desenvolvimento) de acordo com as suas vivências acadêmicas e /ou profissionais.

Mais de 8 mil startups foram criadas nos eventos realizados em cerca de 100 países. É, hoje, um dos maiores eventos em empreendedorismo do mundo,  presente em mais de 150 países, que tem por objetivo construir uma startup do zero em 54 horas.

Empresas como: Easy Taxi, TripLingo, Carousell e Rover.com foram reveladas em Startups Weekends.

Name: Buyer2Buyers
Description:
Buyer2buyers is a digital platform that brings together Buyers (Companies) from all over the world.

HOW TO SIGN UP 

Step 1: Registration 
Each Buyer (Company) can sign up and create an account by filling a form with general information such as login details and company details.

Step 2: Uploading/Searching for products 
Users can upload and display a product of their interest, add full description and specifications and share a relevant video from YouTube or Vimeo. Each Buyer can share its product info with Buyers from other countries.
Each member can also apply a user filter that restricts access to their displayed data, based on users region.

Step 3: Setting display features
Users can set an offer validity period which means that their product will be on display for a certain period of time.

BENEFITS

•	Small companies are able to participate in the production of a product by paying an extra percentage of product’s price to large companies. This constitutes a benefit for both companies, as small ones are able to purchase the desired order quantity at a lower price than the original quoted and at the same time large enterprises can buy the product at a more competitive price because of the increase in order quantity.

•	Large enterprises can buy small quantity. By ordering small quantity large companies reduce their expenses and renew their product range more often, a fact that leads to sales increase.

•	Users can upload and sell excess inventory. Each Buyer’s selling allowance will depend on their account history and purchasing performance.

By using buyer2buyers each company can improve its total stock return, get a product in a cheap deal and shorten the selling cycle.

Name: seos-france
Description:
SEOS (échanges de services gratuits entre particuliers et professionnels) est une plateforme totalement gratuite dédiée aux professionnels, aux particuliers et aux associations.
SEOS a pour vocation de créer du lien social et de réduire les inégalités en permettant à chacun de profiter de toutes les richesses du collectif en totale gratuité. Comment ? En créant une économie solidaire qui remet le sens du mot "entraide" au coeur de notre société, et de nos vies.
Le principe repose sur le fait que chacun a quelque chose à offrir, que vous soyez un particulier, un professionnel, ou bien encore une association, vous possédez un savoir faire qui a de la valeur et correspond au besoin de quelqu'un.
Alors les échanges de services entre voisins qu'est-ce que c'est ?
Par exemple, si votre voiture est en panne, vous pouvez contacter un mécanicien près de chez vous et en échange réparer le toit de sa maison, ou garder ses enfants pour qu'il puisse enfin passer une soirée seul avec sa femme.
En bref sur SEOS on peut :
- Echanger ou offrir ses compétences et ses talents
- Trouver des bénévoles ou trouver une mission de bénévolat
- Découvrir et soutenir des initiatives
Mais SEOS a aussi à cœur de mettre en lumière, au travers de ses articles, les initiatives positives de France et d'ailleurs afin de servir l'intérêt du collectif en donnant plus de visibilité et donc de chances à ces initiatives de croître ou pourquoi pas, de provoquer chez vous l'envie d'agir à votre tour ou tout simplement, vous redonner espoir en un monde meilleur. A terme SEOS souhaite également soutenir financièrement ces initiatives car l'objectif de SEOS est simple : créer ensemble une société plus durable et solidaire !

Name: AZGPS
Description:
AZGPS, LLC, is an Arizona Company formed in November 2004 specifically for the purpose of developing, installing, managing, and operating Arizona’s first Network RTK solution. On December 21st of 2004, with the help of Trimble’s Infrastructure division, we connected our first 4 reference stations, Gilbert, Peoria, Maricopa, and Coolidge to the Trimble RTKnet software creating for the first time a Network RTK or VRS solution in Arizona. In the months leading up to our public release date of March 18th we installed an additional 4 stations, Kearny, Fountain Hills, Black Canyon City, and Wickenburg, and on March 18th at ACSM in Las Vegas Nevada AZGPS successfully released the first Network RTK solution in Arizona.

AZGPS has brought Network RTK to the Phoenix Metropolitan area utilizing a wide –area Trimble Virtual Reference Station (VRS)  Network. AZGPS’s network of reference stations continuously sends data to our central server. The server in turn uses this information to create a network of regional area corrections. When a surveyor starts a VRS survey, the GPS rover sends his position to the central server in the form of a NEMA position string. The server then generates a Virtual Reference Station with its own unique error corrections no more than a few meters from that original position, thus minimizing the effects of spatial decorrelation or ppm error.

For those users that perform static surveys, AZGPS maintains a web server where compressed Rinex, 24hr Rinex, and Raw DAT files are available for download 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. AZGPS’s web server contains a library of information about our network; from maps, network integrity reports, and raw data analysis, to station datasheets and ionosphere and geometric modeling. Currently, AZGPS is allowing complete guest access to our web server, so please log on and see for yourself the tools AZGPS has made available to you.

- We are not "web designers" we are programmers

- Why websites?
The website portion of any Offline Systems project is only the visible tip of a very large iceberg. The future of software is going to be found online. The possibilities of utilizing a world wide network coupled with limitless software are still emerging. Even companies like Google and Microsoft are working tirelessly to create cloud software that will represent the future of computing. To the end user, our websites look like any other database driven system. To the administrators who manage the sites, our software makes it possible to have a single piece of code manage their website's front end, their inventory's back-end, and a link to connect their product inventory to their customer database. The web provides a seamless integration of powerful server tools in a friendly end-user environment. 

- The future of Offline Systems
We are looking for new challenges. We are always working with new hardware and coming up with new solutions for new customers. Our latest projects have focused heavily on telecom and tracking technologies using the web to control remote equipment through the cell phone networks. We are also working on integrating many cutting edge GPS technologies to give clients monitoring tools from remote stations, allowing them to quickly view location and status information of fleets of vehicles or devices on a single screen. LADASTRA accompagne ses clients dans le domaine de la production, Infrastructure et Bases de données, de la définition d'architecture, en passant par leur intégration jusqu'à l'administration en production et le support.
•	Ingénierie système et poste de travail     :
 Architecture, Ingénierie et administrations systèmes ouverts (Unix, Linux, Windows, Citrix), support, packaging et déploiement(XP, Vista, SMS, Vmware, Installshield..), stockage (SAN/NAS) et réseaux (LAN-WAN, Cisco, Nortel, firewall, proxy, VPN...)
•	Ingénierie de production                         :
Depuis le pilotage la supervision et l'exploitation d'application métiers sensibles et critiques et jusqu'à la mise en production et l'intégration de nouveaux projets Unix, Linux, Windows, Control-M, Dollar Universe, CFT, MQSeries, TNG, USVD, Shell, Perl, VBs...

Oracle, Sybase, SQL

Description:

We are approved agents both for Novell and Microsoft as well as holding certifications from manufacturers such as Compaq, HP and Intel.

Name: INTEK.net
Description:
Intek.net (Innovative Technology) was established in 1995, aimed at providing quality computer services to small to medium size businesses and home users. We understand that in order to grow and succeed we must try to be better than the others. It is not easy, but possible. The keys to success are knowledge, experience, as well as the ability to really understand the clients needs. 

We understand, how important it is to fix your computer problems fast over the phone and/or on site, however what is even more important is to identify the reason(s) why the problem happened in the first place and provide you with solutions and answers which will help eliminate the cause. 

We know people really depend on their computers and it is especially vital to the operation of most businesses to get the problems fixed quickly with minimum disruption to the business. This is why we also offer technical support after hours and on weekends.  Ask about our INTEK Managed Services! 

We work with people, not with computers. Computers are tools, which when customized and tuned correctly will increase the overall productivity and quality of your business.

S2S transactions creates the best value for both the buyer and seller compared to any company on the market today.

Student Grounds is a Boston based startup. SG is looking for top talent in all industries who is passionate and interested in tech-startups.
